summary: Document the stack-aware production readiness gate.
rationale: The readiness matrix must distinguish current Graphite parent-branch governance from the post-restack origin/main governance check. This keeps the final gate accurate while the runtime production readiness work lands as stacked PRs.
verification: uv run ty check src tests tools
uv run pytest tests/test_liepin_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_cli.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py -q
deletion_targets: ambiguous full production gate that treats the whole unmerged stack as one PR
risks: Reviewers could run the origin/main governance gate before lower stacked PRs land and misclassify the expected large diff as a slice failure.
The final top-of-stack quality gate must remain separate from per-PR path governance.
